summary: Iteration 77: Bot Dispatch Endpoint Testing - All 16 tests passed. Verified /api/bot/dispatch accepts courier and bigship_order_id parameters, saves them to dispatch records, allows missing label when bigship_order_id is provided, and /api/bot/update-tracking correctly updates tracking across collections.
critical_code_review_comments: Backend /api/bot/dispatch correctly accepts courier (line 36014) and bigship_order_id (line 36015) as Form parameters
Backend saves courier to both update_data (lines 36150-36151) and dispatch_doc (line 36261)
Backend saves bigship_order_id to both update_data (lines 36152-36153) and dispatch_doc (line 36262)
Label validation correctly allows missing label when bigship_order_id is provided (lines 36088-36092): has_bigship_label = bigship_order_id is not None
Backend /api/bot/update-tracking correctly searches pending_fulfillment, dispatches, and amazon_orders collections
Frontend proceed_dispatch handler correctly passes courier (line 3576), bigship_order_id (line 3580), and tracking_id (lines 3568-3573) to the backend
seed_data_creation: No seed data created - used existing data for testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 77 verified the Amazon Order processing workflow changes. The /api/bot/dispatch endpoint now accepts courier and bigship_order_id parameters, saves them to dispatch records, and allows missing label when bigship_order_id is provided. The /api/bot/update-tracking endpoint correctly updates tracking across pending_fulfillment, dispatches, and amazon_orders collections.

dispatch_saves_courier_to_record.details: Courier is saved to update_data (lines 36150-36151) and dispatch_doc (line 36261)

dispatch_saves_bigship_order_id_to_recor.details: bigship_order_id is saved to update_data (lines 36152-36153) and dispatch_doc (line 36262)

dispatch_allows_missing_label_with_bigsh.details: Label validation skipped when bigship_order_id is provided (lines 36088-36092): has_bigship_label = bigship_order_id is not None

update_tracking_endpoint.details: POST /api/bot/update-tracking correctly updates tracking in pending_fulfillment, dispatches, and amazon_orders

frontend_proceed_dispatch_integration.details: Frontend correctly passes courier (line 3576), bigship_order_id (line 3580), and tracking_id to backend

api_endpoints_tested.POST /api/bot/dispatch: PASSED - Accepts courier, bigship_order_id, tracking_id parameters
